task_description: Sprint 4: The Brain Wakes Up - Make the AI escape the chatbox and become omnipresent. Fix GreetingHero styling, rebuild VoiceMode without Three.js, create AI Context Layer (provider + backend endpoint), add contextual AI popups/toasts, inline suggestions in Tasks/Calendar, and real-time WebSocket nudge notifications.

verification.summary: Frontend build and lint pass with no errors. Backend py_compile passes. Code review v1 found 6 issues, all fixed and verified in v2 review (APPROVED).
